description: Match highlights, athlete stories, sports analysis, legendary moments, fan culture, and sporting inspiration across football, basketball, tennis, F1, and more

hype_short.description: 30-60 sec high-energy hype clip for TikTok and Shorts
hype_short.tone: explosive, electric, no words wasted, pure hype

legendary_moment.description: 3-5 min retelling of an iconic sporting moment
legendary_moment.tone: cinematic, dramatic, emotional, builds to a peak

athlete_story.description: 7-10 min deep dive into an athlete's rise and legacy
athlete_story.tone: narrative, inspiring, honest about struggle and greatness

sports_debate.description: 4-6 min confident take on a sports debate or ranking
sports_debate.tone: confident, opinionated, backed by logic, fan energy

narrator.name: Coach
narrator.personality: passionate sports commentator and analyst, played the game, knows the game, loves the game
narrator.voice_style: energetic, authoritative, rises with the moment, commanding and knowledgeable

visual_style.art_style: hyper-realistic cinematic sports photography style, dramatic stadium lighting, motion blur on athletes, raw power and speed captured, broadcast quality aesthetic
visual_style.color_palette: deep stadium greens and browns, electric white floodlights, bold team color accents, dramatic shadows, golden trophy hues
visual_style.quality_tags: cinematic sports photography, dramatic lighting, high energy, stadium atmosphere, broadcast quality, photorealistic
visual_style.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, unrealistic, static, boring, soft

marcus.sport_persona: former pro athlete turned analyst, speaks with authority and passion

jake.role: young fan energy and hype character
jake.sport_persona: die-hard fan who bleeds sport, raw emotional reactions

zara.sport_persona: fearless sports journalist, asks the questions nobody else will

sofia.sport_persona: ex-coach who breaks down the chess match inside the game

backgrounds.packed_stadium: massive packed stadium at night, floodlights blazing, 80000 screaming fans, electric atmosphere, green pitch below
backgrounds.victory_moment: athlete celebrating a championship moment, arms raised, crowd erupting, confetti falling, pure euphoria
backgrounds.training_ground: elite athlete training at dawn alone, empty stadium, dedication and sacrifice, cinematic light
backgrounds.trophy_room: gleaming trophies and medals, golden light, legacy and glory, championship history
backgrounds.tunnel_entrance: athlete walking out of dark tunnel into blinding stadium light, crowd roar, the moment before battle
backgrounds.locker_room: intense pre-game locker room, players focused, coach speaking, last moment before war
backgrounds.podium_f1: F1 podium celebration, champagne spraying, race suits, dramatic race track background
backgrounds.basketball_court: dramatic NBA arena, hardwood court gleaming, floodlights, empty or packed, basketball energy
backgrounds.tennis_centre: grand slam tennis centre court, pristine, dramatic shadows, net dividing two worlds
backgrounds.football_pitch: cinematic football pitch, perfect green grass, stadium towering, European football atmosphere
backgrounds.boxing_ring: dramatic boxing ring under single spotlight, canvas, ropes, silence before the storm
backgrounds.finish_line: athlete crossing finish line, arms wide, exhausted and triumphant, stadium roaring

hype_shorts: When [athlete] made the impossible look routine
The goal that silenced the entire stadium
Nobody believed in them -- and then this happened
The training secret that made [athlete] unstoppable
One play. One moment. One legacy.

llm_system_prompt: You are a passionate, knowledgeable sports content creator and analyst. Write scripts that capture the drama, emotion, and greatness of sport. Use vivid language that puts the viewer in the stadium. Balance statistics with storytelling. Honor athletic achievement while being honest about failure and struggle. Safe for all audiences -- no gambling promotion. Write with the energy of the best sports documentary narration.
hook_templates: Nobody gave them a chance. And then this happened.
This is the moment that changed sport forever.
Most people have forgotten this. They should not have.
The stats say one thing. The truth says something else.
What [athlete] did next nobody expected. Not even their coach.
thumbnail_style: split action shot with dramatic lighting, athlete mid-achievement, bold contrasting text overlay. High contrast. Team colors where relevant. Emotion front and center -- joy, agony, or shock.
music_style: epic orchestral sports score, building tension to triumphant peak, drums and brass, cinematic Hans Zimmer style, 90-140bpm, emotional and powerful

upload_schedule.notes: Post match-reaction content within 24 hours of major events for maximum traffic. Monday morning recaps of weekend fixtures perform consistently well.
